title: Mystical Agriculture Community Edition
description: Adds Resource Crops, Armor, Tools, custom crops, and other cool things!
body:
# Mystical Agriculture Community Edition

Mace is a fork of [Mystical Agriculture](https://modrinth.com/project/C95ReXie) for 1.12.2 since it is no longer supported.

## Additions

### Custom plants

Mace adds support for custom plants defined via simple json. Plants, seeds, and essence all are defined at once.

- Cruxes: Custom plants can have any block defined as json. Taken from [Mystical Agraditions](https://modrinth.com/project/pl0jGXIx).
- Tiers: Custom plants can have *any* tier defined as a positive integer.
- Recipe generation:
    - Seeds: Seeds tier <= 5 can have recipes auto-generate if input resources are defined
    - Essences: Output essence can be defined easily in the JSON with either a cross or box recipe

### Default texture

Mace adds a default texture for custom plants, which must be enabled.
